<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `cc-journal weekly`

- **Usage**: `cc-journal weekly [FLAGS] [START]`

Print weekly status report by project

## Arguments

### `[START]`

Week start date (YYYY-MM-DD, default: this Monday)

## Flags

### `--end <END>`

Week end date (YYYY-MM-DD)

### `--copy`

Copy output to clipboard

### `--slack [CHANNEL]`

Send to Slack (optional channel override)
